description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, curved handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a stylized line drawing of an anatomical heart, accompanied by a splash of brown, resembling a coffee stain or artistic accent. The cup has a smooth, glossy finish, and its surface appears hard and non-porous. The interior is plain and unadorned, matching the exterior's white color. The base is slightly narrower than the rim, providing stability when placed on flat surfaces.
description: A white ceramic cup with a curved handle and a stylized anatomical heart design with a brown splash on the front. The surface is glossy and smooth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left and a stylized anatomical heart with a brown splash design.
description_view_1: Back view displaying the plain, undecorated surface of the cup with no handle or artwork visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the right, showing the cup's smooth, glossy surface and rounded shape.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle, with a glimpse of the decorative artwork just visible on the right edge.
